item.title: Just remember if we are still expropriating billions of dollars from the global South, then any distributive plan that does not ...
item.description:
Just remember if we are still expropriating billions of dollars from the global South, then any distributive plan that does not include them as protecting that system not challenging it



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Do not allow yourself to be a tool of an American empire they have enough
item.description:
Do not allow yourself to be a tool of an American empire they have enough

item.title: Do I really need to be affected by the word criminals that I’m condemning to condemn them?
item.description:
Do I really need to be affected by the word criminals that I’m condemning to condemn them?

item.title: This is laughably stupid, but seriously terrifying
item.description:
This is laughably stupid, but seriously terrifying. And that is not to say fascists are better than liberals. It is just to say that we are dealing with a different enemy and we must deal with them as such.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: And yes The Free Press are liberals or at least they are a confusing set of liberals neocons and fascists that care more about m...
item.description:
And yes The Free Press are liberals or at least they are a confusing set of liberals neocons and fascists that care more about making money and appeasing the fascist regime then they do about principles



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
